target: 12. Hitogashima Summer Festival
Everyone~~~~! Good evening~~~~~!!
Good evening~~~~~~!!!
Ngh, Shin-chan, wait up~.
A-Are you okay, Mio!?
(There are so many people, it's hard to even move...!)
(It looks like it's not just the fans, but quite a lot of the islanders have gathered too.)
Whoa... what a massive crowd! And we're still quite a distance from the stage too!
It's completely packed with people in front of and behind us. Isn't this the first time something like this has ever happened in Hitogashima's history?
Today, with the fireworks display in the background, I'll be performing my solo songs and group songs for all of you!
There's still a little time until the fireworks start, so in the meantime, I'd like to introduce everyone to my beloved Hitogashima!
Please stick with me until the very end.
Ah, if anyone starts feeling unwell, please call one of the staff members! And please don't forget to stay hydrated!
(Koyuba-san really is a pro. She must be at least a little bewildered by this situation, but she's not showing it on her face at all.)
Hey Shinpei! Couldn't you have used your acquaintance privileges to get us some special seats?
Are you an idiot? There's no way I could do that.
Mio, <color=#GF_TIPS_030>Toki-chan</color>, you two stay between me and Sou. We'll act as a wall.
Oh, leave it to me.
Since you're wearing a yukata today, we have to be especially careful.
Y-Yeah... thank you.
Since it's Mio's special yukata appearance, you don't want her to be messed with by other people... Is that what you mean?
W-Wait a second, Tokiko!?
Well... something like that. She said it's her first time wearing a yukata, so I don't want it to turn into a bad memory.
I-I'm fine... I'll make sure to be careful...
Ah, by the way--
And that concludes the history of the Hitogashima Summer Festival. First, I think I'll ask the people who aren't locals. Who here has seen the mikoshi~~!?
Ahahaha, it seems like the locals are answering too?
Mio, can you see properly?
Y-Yeah... I can see her, but it's more like I'm barely catching glimpses through the gaps between people.
Almost all of the audience members are taller than Mio-chan and Tokiko, after all.
Here, I've connected to the live stream channel. If you can't see well, just watch it on the smartphone.
Thank you, Tokiko!
Whoa... look at this! The viewer count is insane!
Wow, you're right.
Whoa, so bright...!
Are those camera flashes?
Camera flashes... Are all of these flashes? This is seriously crazy.
There are people taking photos and videos too. It seems like some people are even live-streaming it on their own channels.
Uwaaaahhhh! Kaori-cha~~~n!
It's true... They're probably fans, but even though it's unofficial, it's getting a lot of views.
She really feels like an idol at the peak of her popularity. I can hardly believe she's from this island.
Do you really not remember much from when Koyuba-san was on the island, Sou?
Ah, I think we interacted a bit, but I honestly don't remember much.
Well, she was a pretty quiet kid back then. To think a kid like that would succeed as an idol and hold a live show on her home island...
I really think it's amazing.
Yeah, no kidding.
You know, I was actually worrying until just now about whether it was really okay for me to be enjoying the festival today.
It hasn't even been that long since Sis passed away, after all.
But when I think about Kaori-chan, who's been working so hard for the island...
If Sis were alive, she'd probably get mad at me and say, "Hurry up and go! This isn't the time to hesitate!"
Mio...
Yeah! If Ushio were here, she'd definitely be the first to join in and get completely hyped up!
Who knows, maybe she's watching from somewhere right now?
Yeah, I feel like she is! Knowing Sis, she's probably having an absolute blast.
...Yeah, you're right.
Ah, fireworks!
...Which means!
It's time! Well then, here goes the first song!
Shin-chan, it's starting!
A-Ah, my heart's pounding.
Mine too!
Is everyone ready~!?
Yeah, looks like everyone is ready!
Whoa!? Didn't she just smile right at me!?
She was definitely smiling, but assuming it was directed at you is just being overly self-conscious, brother.
Haha...
Well then, please listen!
(There were some unexpected turns, but...)
(If the festival ends safely like this, then the town revitalization is a success.)
Kyaaaaaaaah!!!!
(...A scream!?)
Wh... what is THAT!?
W-What's going on!?
Kaori-san's gaze... It looks like it's directed toward the back of the shrine grounds.
Ah... ah...
Run!! Everyone, hurry and get away from here!!
K-Kaori-chan!?
Hiiieee!! H-Help meeeeee!
Everyone! Run!!
Gyaaaaaaaaah!
Hiiiiiiiiiieee! Gyaaaaaaaah!
W-What's happening! I can't see well from here!?
(The people in the back are collapsing one after another... And standing beyond them is--)
Myy~, if you don't run away quickly, things are going to get terrible.
A... aaah...
Kyaaaaaaah!!
Juuust like this.
(What the hell is that guy! A four-armed monster... a Shadow!?)
H-Hey... that's... part of the live performance or something, right...?
Ah... so you think so too?
This is an incredible performance! I have to show this to fans all over the world!
S-Shin-chan, is this...
This is bad...! They're mistaking that four-armed Shadow for a performance!
(What is the meaning of this...!?)
(Was my assumption that Shadows avoid people's eyes completely wrong!?)
Sou! It's dangerous here! Take Mio and Toki-chan and run!
Aren't you running with us, Shinpei!?
I'm going to save Koyuba-san! You guys run towards the shrine approach! I'll head there later too!
O-Oh, got it! Let's go, Mio-chan, Tokiko!
But Shin-chan...!
I'll definitely meet up with you later! Mio, you need to run first!
B-But...
Mio...
Uwaaah, awesome! It's super realistic!
Move, move! I gotta get a close-up to rack up those views!
Hey, stop! Don't go!
Look at this, everyone! It's an unbelievable surprise performance at Kaori-chan's live show!
See? Isn't it amazing!? Doesn't it look like a real crime scene!? It's seriously well-made!
Isn't it cool? You can come closer and get a better look, you know.
Eh, really!? Lucky!
How is it? The feeling of being about to die?
What's this... blood? Eh, why... *Gurgle*!
Gyaaaaaaaaaah!!
Uwaaaaah...!? R-Runnnn!!!
Everyone realized it all at once. That what's happening right in front of them isn't a performance, but reality.
This is bad, Shinpei.
Yeah... with people running around in a panic, we won't be able to move--
Well, well...
This is amazing. I only intended to increase Mother's meals, but to think I'd get to see such an interesting spectacle.
(Did he just say... "meals"? Don't tell me, the Shadows are...)
(What the hell is that guy!?)
Hey, don't push me!
Don't stop moving! You're gonna get us killed!
Hoh... well, well. Humans truly are fascinating creatures.
Just when I thought they were merely fleeing in panic, to think the number of people pointing cameras at me would actually increase at a time like this.
Is it to commemorate something? Well, the reason doesn't matter anyway.
Oh, I thought something was glowing... That person's camera from earlier is still recording, I see.
Hah... hahahahahahaha! What an incredible amount of comments. It seems we even have people from overseas watching.
"It's so well-made"? "The CG is amazing"?
Ah, so there are still people who think my appearance is fake.
Well, it doesn't matter what you think. The truth has absolutely no meaning before the end, after all.
Now then... is there anyone who would like to be the next victim?
Right now is your chance to have your final moments broadcast to the entire world, you know?
Come now, let us all enjoy this ending together.
You're in the way!!
--Whoa!?
(The flow of people is slight, but...!)
(I might be able to reach Koyuba-san right now...!)
Kyaa!!
Koyuba-san!?
(Mio's shadow...! When did she get to the stage!?)
M... Mio-chan, what's wrong!? P-Put away that scary thing...
Your role is over now. Thanks for your hard work.
Stop!!
Shinpei-kun!?
Koyuba-san, hurry over here!
Y-Yeah!
Shin-chan, isn't that a bit mean? Don't just shove me out of nowhere.
(I have to at least get Koyuba-san out of here somehow...!)
(But I don't have anything that could be used as a weapon...)
Heave... ho.
Hii!!
(T-This guy! He jumped all the way here in one go!?)
(Crap... we're sandwiched!)
Not bad. You're just like a knight protecting a princess.
What did you come here for...? I think I'm perfectly capable of handling this alone.
Well, until just a moment ago, all sorts of people were broadcasting today's spectacle to the world.
That reminded me there was a live stream camera set up over here too... Ah, this is it, this is it.
Let's see?
Ah, the camera is already stopped. Is it just the <color=#GF_TIPS_098>news flash</color> on the monitor?
I thought Kaori-chan's live stream would be seen by a lot more people, but...
Well, it doesn't really matter. With this many meals, Mother's power will become even more unshakeable.
This has the potential to become the most amusing ending I've aimed for yet.
Are you done?
Hehe, you're quite impatient, Mio-chan. Well then, let's pick up where we left off.
The princess and the knight. Do you have a request for which one goes first, Mio-chan?
I don't really care either way...
But could you stop calling them princess and knight? It's kind of pissing me off.
Hahahahaha, my apologies.
W-Why is this happening? This is too cruel...
(Think, think...! A way to let her escape from here!)
...Koyuba-san, I know it's scary, but be ready to run at any moment.
A... alright!
Hey, what the hell are you guys planning!? What do you gain by doing all this!?
Hey, you could at least tell me that much, couldn't you!?
You're just trying to buy time while you think of a way out, right?
And if nothing works out, you're planning to act as a decoy to let that person escape, aren't you?
That's very like you, Shin-chan.
Why are you going so far to protect that girl?
Actually, who even is she? You seem awfully close.
T-This person is...
Actually, never mind. I'm just going to erase both of you right now anyway.
W... Why?
Please...! Go back to the normal Mio-chan!
My, my, things have taken quite an interesting turn, haven't they?
In a situation like this, perhaps I should leave things here to Mio-chan.
I'll return to hunting the audience.
Please stop! Don't kill anyone else!
Koyuba-san, don't step forward!
B-But...!
Ah, that's right. Thank you, Kaori-chan.
The reason I'm in such a fantastic mood right now is all thanks to you gathering so many people for me.
No...
I'm sure Mother will be delighted as well. Well then.
(With just a light jump, he went that far...!)
Hey, Shin-chan.
I've been wondering this for a while now, but did you hear about the Shadows from Sis?
But... if you only heard it from Sis, it still feels strange.
It feels like you've known about all sorts of things right from the very beginning.
Say, Shin-chan. Why is that?
(It's bad if she figures out about the loops...)
(Even so, I need to drag this conversation out as long as possible...)
If I tell you the reason... will you tell me about yourselves?
Why do you want to know about us so badly? Once you're dead, knowing won't mean anything anyway.
I don't think that's necessarily true. Hey, Koyuba-san.
A-Ah, yeah...
Koyuba-san... Do you have anything that could be used as a weapon?
I only have this...
This is...?
This keychain has pepper spray hidden inside it.
If you take the cap off, the main body is pepper spray, and the cap itself functions as a security alarm...
I see...
(But to use the spray, I have to get pretty close to the Shadow...)
(And I don't even know if pepper spray will work on a Shadow in the first place...)
(But, right now--)
Can I borrow that?
Yeah, use it however you need...
Thanks.
(Right now, I have no choice but to rely on this!)
What are you whispering about?
No... nothing?
Haa, whatever. I don't care what you know anymore, Shin-chan.
Prepare yourselves, both of you.
No... wait a second!
(If it's come to this, I don't care if it's a lie or what!)
I've known about you for a long time! Ever since the moment you copied Mio!
Pfft, fufufu...
Wh... what's so funny!?
I could tell just by looking at your face. Shin-chan, you're lying, aren't you?
(Dammit... I can't escape like this!)
(In this opening...!)
Koyuba-san, run!
B-But, in front of you, Shinpei-kun...
Eh, in front of me...?
Whoa!?
You're an idiot, Shin-chan... Did you really think throwing something like that would do anything?
(Dammit... I can't escape like this!)
(Alright... now!!)
Take this!!
Shin-chan? What did you just throw--
Wh-What is this sound?
Now! Koyuba-san, run!!
Y-Yes!!
I won't let you escape.
No, I'll make sure we escape!
Some~thing's weird.
It feels like you'd have a trump card or something...
(Alright, next is...!)
What's this? I don't really get it, but is this your trump card?
(I-It's gone!? The pepper spray I was holding in my hand is...!)
(Don't tell me... she snatched it!?)
You're too naive, Shin-chan. If it's your trump card, you have to keep it hidden properly until the very end.
Aah, jeez! So annoying!
Guh...!
(Dammit... I can't escape like this!)
Eat this!!
Ugh... wh-what is this!?
My... my eyes won't open!
(Alright, it's working!)
Ugh, this is seriously the worst!
(While I have the chance, I need to hurry and catch up to Koyuba-san!)
